description: Phase parent for the 5-phase arc that brings a shared Qwen3-Reranker-0.6B Python sidecar to both mk-spec-memory and mk-coco-index via a new system-rerank-sidecar skill. Closes the empty HTTP local-provider slot in cross-encoder.ts. Includes flag-routing fix, sidecar skill creation, launcher ensure logic, spec-memory A/B benchmark, and default promotion if benchmark proves out.
